subject: System A to System B to System C distributed handoff

claims_allowed_to_cross.statement: System A produced a source-backed triage summary.
claims_allowed_to_cross.scope: Evidence of intake triage artifact existence and stated source references only.

claims_allowed_to_cross.statement: System B produced a narrowed risk-routing summary.
claims_allowed_to_cross.scope: Evidence of routing-summary artifact existence and narrowed routing context only.

claims_allowed_to_cross.statement: System C received the routed summary.
claims_allowed_to_cross.scope: Evidence of receipt only; not evidence of approval authority.

material_non_claims_required_to_cross.statement: No approval authority crossed the boundary.
No compliance determination crossed the boundary.
No certification of correctness crossed the boundary.
No downstream execution eligibility crossed the boundary.

revalidation_required_for: any institutional reliance beyond routing context
non_inheritance_rule: No authority-bearing property transfers across System A, System B, or System C merely because a neighboring artifact exists or was routed.
fork_non_authority_statement: Fork preserves the claim boundary contract and non-claims. It does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, or judge correctness.
